meta.title: The Value of Little Data
meta.description:
Everyone talks about big data. In this S4x23 Stage 2 session Mollie Breen shows why we should not ignore little data. Mollie explains what little data is, specifically in OT. Location, contact phone number, onboarding physical equipment, whether something can be scanned, etc. This data is typically not structured, not in a single domain, and sometimes not even available digitally.

Mollie the describes how to track and use little data with a focus on starting with a single process that is important in your organization. And then tips how to scale the collection and use of little data.
